global_production_variables.directorial_treatment: Warm children's picture-book live-action/CG hybrid: soft practical lighting, gentle camera moves, playful physical comedy for a small black-and-white dog, cozy domestic bedtime palette, rhyme-friendly pacing with clear cause-and-effect staging.

Character_Narrator.description: Off-screen storyteller who delivers the book's rhyming narration; never appears on camera.
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Warm adult storyteller, medium pitch, unhurried friendly pace, clear diction for rhymes, gentle smile in the voice; same voice every scene.

Character_Buster.description: Buster the Noodle Head Dog: small black-and-white dog, playful and bouncy like a frog, not very bright, expressive face, wears black-and-white pajamas later; beloved family pet.
Character_Buster.voice_profile: Small dog energy: light playful yips, soft whines, and happy pants rather than human speech; bright, quick, slightly goofy cadence; same voice every scene.

Character_Mom.description: Momma/Mom: kind adult caregiver in a cozy home, patient bedtime parent who guides Buster outside, gives treats and water, and pets him while he sleeps.
Character_Mom.voice_profile: Adult woman, warm medium pitch, calm gentle pace, soft maternal accent-neutral English, reassuring energy; same voice every scene.

Character_Daddy.description: Daddy: adult partner in Mom and Daddy's bedroom; mostly present as a sleeping/settled figure in the shared bed during Buster's bedtime climb-in.
Character_Daddy.voice_profile: Adult man, low-medium pitch, quiet sleepy energy if any sound; minimal dialogue; same voice every scene.

Loc_Home_Interior.description: Cozy family house living/entry/treat area with soft rugs, dog bowls, and warm evening lamps.
Loc_Home_Interior.visual_lock: Warm wood or painted walls, soft evening practical lamps, dog water bowl visible near treat area, front door that opens to the yard, lived-in family clutter kept gentle and child-safe; no harsh neon.

Loc_Yard_Bushes.description: Small residential outdoor yard at evening with bushes where Buster can potty.
Loc_Yard_Bushes.visual_lock: Evening outdoor light, green bushes along a fence or path, grass or dirt patch for potty, house exterior door visible for exit/return; soft twilight, not full daylight noon.

Loc_Stairs.description: Indoor staircase leading up toward the parents' bedroom.
Loc_Stairs.visual_lock: Carpeted or wood stairs with a simple banister, warm hallway lighting, upward climb toward a bedroom landing; same staircase whenever Buster goes up.

Loc_Parents_Bedroom.description: Parents' bedroom with a large bed where Buster jumps in to sleep.
Loc_Parents_Bedroom.visual_lock: Large shared bed with soft bedding, bedside lamps on low warm glow, calm night interior, enough room for a small dog to jump onto the bed; cozy 'home sweet home' feeling.

Loc_Dreamscape.description: Soft dream space of fluffy snow and a yard with running bunnies for Buster to chase.
Loc_Dreamscape.visual_lock: Slightly softer, brighter, floating dream look; fluffy snow drifts and an open yard with bunnies; Buster remains the same small black-and-white dog; no hard real-world furniture.

scenes.dramatic_function: Introduce Buster's identity, look, and playful noodle-head personality.
scenes.summary: Narration presents Buster the Noodle Head Dog as a small black-and-white pup who jumps around like a frog and is not very bright, while he bounces through the cozy home.
scenes.continuity_notes: Establish Buster's black-and-white coat and small size; evening bedtime world begins.

music_intent.style_description: Light playful children's underscore with soft piano and pizzicato strings.

source_excerpts.excerpt: He's Buster The Noodle Head Dog / He jumps around like a frog / He's small, black, and white / But not very bright!

story_beats.intent: Title presence and first look at Buster in his home.
story_beats.visual_event: Small black-and-white dog Buster stands proudly in the warm living area, tail wagging, looking straight toward camera energy without breaking kid-film naturalism.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's Buster The Noodle Head Dog
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: soft house ambience, distant clock tick

story_beats.intent: Show frog-like jumping energy.
story_beats.visual_event: Buster springs and hops around the room in silly frog-like jumps, paws landing soft on the rug.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He jumps around like a frog
story_beats.blocking_notes: Buster hops in a loose circle of the living space; keep face readable on landings.
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: light paw thumps, happy collar jingle

story_beats.intent: Lock coat colors and goofy not-bright personality.
story_beats.visual_event: Close on Buster's small black-and-white face as he tilts his head with a blank, cheerful, not-very-bright expression.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's small, black, and white / But not very bright! / He's Buster The Noodle Head Dog

scenes.dramatic_function: Bedtime is called; establish potty-before-bed rule and Buster's confusion.
scenes.summary: Momma says it is time for bed. Buster wants to rest but must potty first; Mom explains dogs go outside, which confuses Buster.
scenes.continuity_notes: Same home interior evening lighting; Mom enters Buster's space for bedtime routine.

music_intent.style_description: Gentle bedtime cue with soft woodwinds under light comic beats.
music_intent.mood_arc: Cozy call to bed, then mild comic confusion.

source_excerpts.excerpt: When Momma says, "It's time for bed", / He wants to rest his furry head / Before he goes, he has to potty / Going on the floor is naughty! / "A doggy goes outside" Mom said / That makes no sense in Buster's head!

story_beats.intent: Mom announces bedtime.
story_beats.visual_event: Mom stands in the living area, leaning gently toward Buster, speaking clearly that it is time for bed.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Mom
story_beats.dialogue: It's time for bed
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom faces Buster at dog height; Buster looks up at her.

story_beats.intent: Buster wants to rest his head but potty comes first.
story_beats.visual_event: Buster lowers his furry head toward a soft spot as if to sleep, then perks up with a potty need; he glances at the floor and is steered away from it.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He wants to rest his furry head / Before he goes, he has to potty / Going on the floor is naughty!
must_not: Buster actually pottying on the indoor floor

story_beats.intent: Mom states the outside rule; Buster is confused.
story_beats.visual_event: Mom points toward the exterior door and speaks the outside rule; Buster cocks his head with a blank noodle-head look that shows it makes no sense to him.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Mom
story_beats.dialogue: A doggy goes outside
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom's eyeline to Buster then to the door; Buster's eyeline follows door then back to Mom with confusion.

story_beats.intent: Narration underlines Buster's confusion.
story_beats.visual_event: Hold on Buster's confused face as he processes Mom's rule.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: That makes no sense in Buster's head!

scenes.setting: Evening - yard bushes then home entry
scenes.dramatic_function: Buster completes outdoor potty and returns for a proud spin for Mom.
scenes.summary: Buster walks outside among the bushes, does his job, comes back inside, and spins for Mom.
scenes.continuity_notes: Exit through home door to yard; return same door; Mom waits inside for the spin.

music_intent.style_description: Light outdoor stroll motif returning to cozy indoor reward feel.
music_intent.mood_arc: Task focus then proud little triumph.

source_excerpts.excerpt: Yet, off he goes to walk around / Outside where bushes can be found / He does his job, and then comes in / For Mom he does a little spin

story_beats.intent: Buster heads outside to the bushes.
story_beats.visual_event: Buster trots out the door into the evening yard and walks around where bushes can be found.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Yet, off he goes to walk around / Outside where bushes can be found

story_beats.intent: He does his potty job outside (tasteful).
story_beats.visual_event: At the bushes, Buster stops and does his potty job in a child-appropriate, non-graphic way, then looks satisfied.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He does his job, and then comes in

story_beats.intent: Return inside and spin for Mom.
story_beats.visual_event: Buster comes back through the door into the home and does a little proud spin in front of Mom.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: For Mom he does a little spin
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom faces Buster near the entry; Buster spins in place for her approval; Mom smiles down at him.
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: door close, happy spin collar jingle, Mom soft laugh

scenes.dramatic_function: Reward routine: treat by his feet and a drink of water.
scenes.summary: Buster spins for a treat; Mom gently lays it by his feet; he also drinks water, modeled as a good habit.
scenes.continuity_notes: Same interior after return from yard; treat and water bowl continuity.

music_intent.style_description: Sweet simple reward cue, soft glockenspiel and piano.

source_excerpts.excerpt: He spins around to get a treat / She gently lays it by his feet / He has his drink of water too / This also would be good for you!

story_beats.intent: Spin earns a treat.
story_beats.visual_event: Buster spins again expectantly; Mom holds a small dog treat and gently lays it on the floor by his front feet.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He spins around to get a treat / She gently lays it by his feet
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom kneels or bends; treat placed by Buster's feet, not tossed wildly; Buster eats from the floor.

story_beats.intent: Water drink as healthy beat.
story_beats.visual_event: Buster moves to his water bowl and drinks; Mom watches approvingly.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He has his drink of water too / This also would be good for you!

scenes.dramatic_function: Bedtime dressing and journey upstairs into Mom and Daddy's bed.
scenes.summary: Buster wears black-and-white pajamas, climbs the many stairs to Mom and Daddy's room, and jumps into bed none too soon.
scenes.continuity_notes: Pajamas stay on Buster from this scene forward; Daddy already in or on the bed; lamps low.

music_intent.style_description: Ascending soft march into lullaby-adjacent bedroom theme.
music_intent.mood_arc: Playful climb resolving into snug arrival.

source_excerpts.excerpt: Pajamas, black and white he wears / And then he climbs the many stairs / To get to Mom and Daddy's room / And jump in bed, and none too soon

story_beats.intent: Buster in black-and-white pajamas.
story_beats.visual_event: Buster now wears black-and-white dog pajamas matching his coat; he stands ready for bed in the home interior.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Pajamas, black and white he wears

story_beats.intent: Climb the many stairs.
story_beats.visual_event: Buster climbs the staircase step by step, pajamas on, determined little bedtime mission.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: And then he climbs the many stairs
story_beats.blocking_notes: Upward travel; optional Mom following behind at a distance.

story_beats.intent: Arrive at Mom and Daddy's room and jump into bed.
story_beats.visual_event: Buster enters Mom and Daddy's bedroom and jumps up onto the big bed where Daddy is settled and Mom is near; he lands in the covers none too soon.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: To get to Mom and Daddy's room / And jump in bed, and none too soon
story_beats.blocking_notes: Bed is the landing target; Daddy already in bed; Mom can be sitting or standing bedside; Buster jumps onto mattress into soft covers.
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: bed soft thump, sheets rustle, happy yip

scenes.setting: Night - dream of snow and bunnies
scenes.dramatic_function: Show Buster's dreams and the promise of another day to play.
scenes.summary: Though not that smart, Buster knows he will dream of fluffy snows and bunnies running across the yard that he chases hard; he goes to sleep because tomorrow is another day.
scenes.continuity_notes: Begin on Buster dozing in bed then enter dreamscape; exit back toward sleep in bed by scene end.

music_intent.style_description: Dreamy lullaby with airy pads and light playful chase motif for bunnies.
music_intent.mood_arc: Floaty wonder into gentle chase joy, then settle.

source_excerpts.excerpt: He's not that smart, but still he knows / He'll have a dream of fluffy snows, / Or bunnies running 'cross the yard / And how he'll chase them very hard / He goes to sleep because they say / Tomorrow is another day

story_beats.intent: Enter sleep and dream of fluffy snow.
story_beats.visual_event: Buster's eyes grow heavy in the parents' bed; the image softens into a dream of fluffy snow where pajama-clad Buster bounds through soft white drifts.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's not that smart, but still he knows / He'll have a dream of fluffy snows,

story_beats.intent: Dream bunnies and hard chase.
story_beats.visual_event: In the dream yard, bunnies run across the open space; Buster chases them very hard with joyful full-speed runs and leaps.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Or bunnies running 'cross the yard / And how he'll chase them very hard
must_not: real harm to bunnies; keep playful dream chase
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: light running paws, distant happy barks

story_beats.intent: Tomorrow is another day; settle toward sleep.
story_beats.visual_event: Dream chase slows; Buster's dream self eases as we dissolve back toward him resting in the real bed, accepting sleep.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He goes to sleep because they say / Tomorrow is another day

scenes.dramatic_function: Closing: sleep, love, and peaceful end.
scenes.summary: Narration promises another day for silly dogs to run and play; Buster falls asleep well-fed and warm while Mommy pets him; he is loved for keeps; final zzzz.
scenes.continuity_notes: Buster remains in black-and-white pajamas in the shared bed; Mom pets him; end on peaceful sleep.

music_intent.style_description: Soft lullaby resolution, sparse piano and warm pads fading to silence.

source_excerpts.excerpt: Another day for silly dogs / To run and play and jump like frogs / He falls asleep, lays down his head / He's warm and soft and quite well-fed / His Mommy pets him while he sleeps / This noodle head is loved for keeps.....

story_beats.intent: Promise of another playful day.
story_beats.visual_event: Buster nestles deeper into the bed covers, still faintly frog-jump energy settling out of his body as he prepares to sleep.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Another day for silly dogs / To run and play and jump like frogs

story_beats.intent: Falls asleep warm, soft, well-fed.
story_beats.visual_event: Buster lays down his head on the bedding, body soft and warm, clearly full and safe, eyes closing.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He falls asleep, lays down his head / He's warm and soft and quite well-fed

story_beats.intent: Mommy pets him; loved for keeps.
story_beats.visual_event: Mom sits or leans at the bedside and gently pets sleeping Buster; Daddy rests nearby in the bed; the family tableau is peaceful.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: His Mommy pets him while he sleeps / This noodle head is loved for keeps.....
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom's hand gently strokes Buster's head/back; Buster stays asleep; warm eyeline of care from Mom to dog.

story_beats.intent: Final sleep sound and end card energy.
story_beats.visual_event: Hold on Buster fully asleep in the cozy bed as the room stays still; peaceful final image of the noodle head dog at rest.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Zzzzzzzz
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: gentle snore-like dog sleep breaths fading out
